CloudScale Pro

by NexaSystems Inc.

star star star star star_half
4.9 (1.2k reviews)
Try for Free bookmark
About Features Screenshots Reviews Changelog

About the Product

CloudScale Pro is the industry-leading infrastructure management suite designed for high-growth SaaS companies. Scale your operations with automated provisioning, real-time resource optimization, and enterprise-grade security protocols that keep your data safe and your costs predictable.

Whether you're managing a handful of containers or a global fleet of servers, our intuitive dashboard gives you complete visibility over your entire stack.

Screenshots

Key Features

trending_up

Scalability

Automated resource allocation based on real-time traffic demands.

shield

Security

SOC2 Type II compliant with end-to-end data encryption.

analytics

Analytics

Deep-dive metrics with custom reporting and alerts.

api

API Integration

Full RESTful API support for custom workflows and automation.

star star star star star

"CloudScale Pro has completely transformed how we handle our backend infrastructure. The auto-scaling is seamless and the cost savings have been significant."

DevOps Lead

star star star star star

"Incredible tool for mid-sized teams. The API integration was very straightforward. Documentation is top-notch."

Pricing Plans

Pro $99/mo

Unlimited nodes, Advanced Metrics

Starter $49/mo

Up to 5 nodes, Basic Support

Enterprise Custom

Dedicated instance, 24/7 Support
